title: The Essentials++
description: The Essential Modpack to enhance your Minecraft gameplay.
body:
# Info:

[![Enviroment](https://img.shields.io/badge/Enviroment-Client-purple)](https://modrinth.com/mods?e=client)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-36%20Online-darkblue?logo=discord)](https://discord.gg)
[![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/Downloads-1712-darkgreen?logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-essentials++)

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/I2I61APAYX)

# Key Notes:

This modpack may have some features that servers consider cheating, keep in mind what servers you play on with this modpack.

# Features:

This modpack is to enhance your Minecraft client and improve performance and adds some essential features. This mod does add some optimization, and lots of client side mods.
Features include: a better f3 menu, auto elytra, special resource packs, low fire, low shield.
This modpack has been carefully designed to meet a Minecraft standard for smps. This modpack does add some things that some servers might not allow, so proceed with caution when using this modpack on servers like Hypixel


# Shaders are nice to have:
### To get ProjectLUMA Shaders, go to: [ProjectLUMA](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/projectluma)

### To get Sildur's Vibrant Shaders, go to: [Sildurs Vibrant Shaders](https://sildurs-shaders.github.io/)


# These mods are also nice:
### To get the Physics Mod, go to: [Haubna's Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/V7V5KPISX)

### To get Distant Horizons for 1.21.4, go to: [Distant Horizon 1.21.4](https://gitlab.com/distant-horizons-team/distant-horizons/-/jobs/artifacts/main/download?job=build:%20[1.21.4])
